data.name: HERO IS DEAD
data.detailed_description:
內含40道偵探謎題。每道謎題限時1分鐘，挑戰你的觀察力、判斷力和邏輯推理能力。

親愛的小偵探們，你有信心在1分鐘內找到真相嗎？

快來接受挑戰，加入我們，一起調查各種離奇案件吧！

最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 64bits OS
  • 處理器: Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: HERO IS DEAD
data.detailed_description:
Containing 40 detective puzzles. Each puzzle has a one-minute time limit, challenging your observation, judgment, and logical reasoning skills.

Dear little detectives, are you confident that you can find out the truth in just one minute?

Come and accept the challenge and join us in investigating various bizarre cases!
data.about_the_game:

Come and accept the challenge and join us in investigating various bizarre cases!
